name: TurdKick
short: Auto-kick members who receive a designated trap role.
description: Watches for a configurable trap role being assigned to any member and automatically kicks them. Includes optional DM notification, audit log reason, and a dedicated log channel.
author: YourNameHere
install_msg: TurdKick loaded! Use `[p]turdkick role @role` to set your trap role, then `[p]turdkick status` to verify the config.
